![](https://theconstructiongroup.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/11/TCG_name-02.svg)

The Construction Group, well known as TCG is a progressive realty group with a purpose of turning dream homes into happy realities. TCG was incorporated in year 1987 with a vision to create a healthy living environment with quality construction. With properties ranging from 1, 2 and 3BHK and commercial premises. Our skillful team is engaged over three decades in creating projects that have stood the test of time. With functionality, design and technology at the heart of everything we create, our projects become iconic in every aspect.

Noteworthy projects – Some of our notable projects in Pune are Westend Village – Kothrud, Akash Darshan – Mahatma Society, Deccan Chembers – Karve Road, TCG Square – Sadashiv Peth, Verve & Verve Residecy, – Wakad, Aryabatta, Prabhalaximan, Rama Apartment,

Uma Apartment – Walvekar Nagar.

### Featured Project

Where Happiness lives

data.summary: The Construction Group (TCG), established in 1987, focuses on quality construction and real estate, aiming to create lasting living environments. With a portfolio that includes residential and commercial properties in Pune, TCG emphasizes innovative design and functionality. Noteworthy projects include Westend Village, Akash Darshan, and TCG Square, among others. The company promotes investment opportunities and joint ventures, highlighting a commitment to integrity and trust in the redevelopment sector. Their mission is to enhance lives by building a legacy for future generations.
